---
title: "Chapter 1: Limits and Continuity"
---

Welcome to Chapter 1! 

Use the links below to download the printable PDF packets.

### For Students
Print this blank packet to bring to class.

<!--* [📄 Download Blank Student Notes](Chapter-1-Student-Notes.pdf) >!-->


### For Parents & Review
Use this completed packet to check your work or review missed lectures. 

<!--* [📝 Download Completed Teacher Notes](Chapter-1-Teacher-Notes.pdf) >!-->
